'''Slaff''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] who worked at the [[Desert Survey Office/Legends|Desert Survey Office]] as [[Arden Telowe|Telowe]]'s assistant. The Desert Survey Office was located in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].

{{Char-stub}}
